projects.description: A high-end digital experience for a Mediterranean dining concept.

caseStudy.problem: Verano had a dated website that didn't reflect their premium atmosphere, leading to low online engagement and a high bounce rate on their reservation page.
caseStudy.strategy: We focused on "Digital Elegance" – using high-resolution lifestyle photography, a minimalist layout, and a simplified 3-click reservation system.

execution.title: Visual Identity
execution.content: Capturing the essence of Mediterranean luxury through photography.

projects.description: Scaling a luxury skincare brand through targeted performance marketing and content strategy.

caseStudy.problem: Creator Growth Studio had a great product but struggled to reach their target demographic effectively, resulting in high CAC and low repeat purchase rates.
caseStudy.strategy: We implemented a multi-channel funnel focusing on educational content and retargeting high-intent users.

execution.title: Strategy Phase
execution.content: Analyzing audience behavior to identify growth opportunities.

projects.description: Launching a new tech gadget through a network of 50+ micro-influencers in the productivity space.

caseStudy.problem: FlowMetrics needed to build immediate trust and awareness for their new productivity tool in a crowded market.
caseStudy.strategy: Leveraged authentic creators who actually use productivity tools, focusing on "Day in the Life" integrations.

execution.title: UI Design
execution.content: Creating a clean, intuitive interface for data exploration.

projects.description: A complete digital overhaul for a boutique French café, focusing on high-end visuals and seamless reservation flow.

caseStudy.problem: Aurielle had a dated website that didn't reflect their premium atmosphere, leading to low online engagement and a high bounce rate on their reservation page.
caseStudy.strategy: We focused on "Digital Elegance" – using high-resolution lifestyle photography, a minimalist layout, and a simplified 3-click reservation system.

execution.title: Visual Identity
execution.content: We captured the essence of the café through professional photography and a color palette inspired by Parisian mornings.

execution.title: Reservation Flow
execution.content: Implemented a custom booking engine that reduced friction, resulting in a significant uplift in confirmed bookings.
